//: REFERENCE manifest for the 'open this folder as a project' path. If you instead create a fresh URP 3D project in Unity Hub (recommended in README), Unity generates its own version-correct manifest and this file is not used. Package versions below target Unity 6 LTS (6000.0.x); Unity will resolve compatible versions on first open.
//netcode: The com.unity.netcode.gameobjects + com.unity.services.* packages below power Phase 6 (co-op). They are OPTIONAL: the single-player game (Phases 0-5) compiles and runs without them. To enable co-op, keep these and add the scripting define SIMCITY_NETCODE (Project Settings > Player > Scripting Define Symbols). See PHASE6.md.
